description_long: This street light features a tall, slender cylindrical pole with a dark finish, topped by a single, horizontally extending arm that supports a modern, streamlined lamp head. The lamp head is rectangular and metallic, with a slightly angled, flat cover that likely houses an LED or similar light source. The pole itself appears to have a subtle ribbed or banded texture near the top, transitioning to a smooth surface along the rest of its length. The lamp head is mounted at a right angle to the pole, projecting outward to provide illumination over a wide area such as a street or sidewalk. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability. This type of street light is commonly found in urban environments, providing efficient and widespread lighting.
description: A tall, dark cylindrical street light with a single horizontal arm supporting a modern, rectangular lamp head. The design is sleek and functional, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the pole and the horizontal arm with the lamp head extending to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the straight, unadorned pole with the lamp head barely visible at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the lamp head extending to the right, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Front view showing the pole and the lamp head projecting outward, with the lamp head's shape and mounting clearly visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, rectangular, metallic lamp head with a flat, slightly angled cover and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: subtle ribbed texture near the top
